11.reason: Error: Using post-increment i++ inside the loop body causes i to be incremented multiple times per iteration, skipping elements and corrupting the array. Should use i+1 instead of i++.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.25 , reason:  Error: Using post-increment i++ inside the loop body causes i to be incremented multiple times per iteration, skipping elements and corrupting the array. Should use i+1 instead of i++.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Error: Using post-increment i++ modifies i twice in the loop, causing incorrect array shifting and potential out-of-bounds access. Should use i+1 instead of i++.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Incorrect use of post-increment; increments i multiple times, causing data corruption
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Error: double increment (i++ in subscript) leads to skipping elements and out-of-bounds access; also missing copy of lenth field
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  The post-increment operator i++ inside the array index causes undefined behavior and incorrect logic. It increments i twice per loop iteration (once in the index, once in the loop update) and assigns values incorrectly. It should be p[i] = p[i+1].
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  The post-increment operator i++ inside the array index causes undefined behavior and incorrect logic. It increments i twice per loop iteration (once in the index, once in the for loop update), skipping elements and copying values incorrectly. It should be p[i] = p[i+1].
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Using i++ inside array index causes skipping of elements and undefined behavior due to multiple modifications of i in one expression]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.25 , reason:  [The use of i++ inside array indexing causes undefined behavior and skips elements incorrectly. It should be p[i] = p[i+1] without modifying i in the expression.]

31.reason: Error: Setting j = i will cause j to become i, but then the inner loop increments j to i+1, skipping the current i element. Should set j = i - 1 so that after increment it becomes i.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Error: Setting j = i will cause j to become i, but then the inner loop increments j to i+1, skipping the current i element. Should set j = i - 1 so that after increment it becomes i.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Incorrect reset; should be j-- to recheck the element that shifted into j's position
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Error: should be j = j-1 to recheck the element that moved to index j after deletion; setting j = i skips many elements
